item.title: 郭明錤：苹果扶持 Intel 制衡台积电，良率目标 50% 至 60%
item.guid: 郭明錤：苹果扶持-Intel-制衡台积电，良率目标-50%-至-60%
item.description:
Tianfeng International Securities analyst Ming-Chi Kuo disclosed yesterday that Apple has initiated projects for low-end and older iPhone, iPad, and Mac processors using Intel's 18A-P series process, with iPhones accounting for approximately 80% of the orders. 天风国际证券分析师郭明錤昨日披露，苹果已在 Intel 18A-P 系列制程上为低阶及旧款 iPhone、iPad 与 Mac 处理器立项，订单中 iPhone 约占 80%。

The tape-out plan shows that Apple expects to ramp up production at Intel in 2027, continue to increase in 2028, and enter a decline phase in 2029. For Intel, the yield target for 2027 is to stably reach over 50% to 60%, but the mass production schedule and shipment scale are currently unclear. 流片规划显示，苹果预计 2027 年在 Intel 放量，2028 年续增，2029 年进入衰退期。Intel 方面，2027 年良率目标为稳定达到 50% 至 60% 以上，量产时程与出货规模目前仍未明朗。

However, Ming-Chi Kuo also pointed out that even if Intel successfully ships, TSMC will still account for more than 90% of Apple's supply chain. 不过，郭明錤也指出，即便 Intel 顺利出货，台积电在苹果供应体系中仍将占 90% 以上比重。

Ming-Chi Kuo believes that Apple's move is intended to cultivate Intel as a long-term alternative supplier. As AI's demand for TSMC's advanced process resources continues to expand, Apple needs to plan ahead while it still has bargaining power. At the same time, Apple is also evaluating other advanced process technologies from Intel. 郭明錤认为，苹果此举是有意将 Intel 培养为长期备选供应商。AI 对台积电先进制程资源的占用将持续扩大，苹果需要在议价能力尚存时提前布局。与此同时，苹果也在同步评估 Intel 其他先进制程技术。

item.title: OpenAI 整合 ChatGPT 与 Codex，Greg Brockman 正式接管产品战略
item.guid: OpenAI-整合-ChatGPT-与-Codex，Greg-Brockman-正式接管产品战略
item.description:
According to WIRED, OpenAI announced a new round of organizational adjustments to employees yesterday, with co-founder and president Greg Brockman officially taking over product strategy. 据 WIRED 报道，OpenAI 昨日向员工宣布新一轮组织调整，联合创始人兼总裁 Greg Brockman 正式接管产品战略。

The report points out that OpenAI is integrating ChatGPT, the programming agent Codex, and developer-facing API businesses into a single core product team, with the goal of merging the three into a "unified experience." 报道指出，OpenAI 将 ChatGPT、编程智能体 Codex 及面向开发者的 API 业务整合进同一核心产品团队，目标是将三者合并为「统一的体验」。

Thibault Sottiaux, former head of Codex, has been promoted to head of core products and platform, overseeing consumer, enterprise, and developer lines; Nick Turley, former head of ChatGPT, has transitioned to enterprise product revamp; and Ashley Alexander, former Instagram VP, has taken over as head of consumer products. Codex 原负责人 Thibault Sottiaux 升任核心产品与平台主管，统管消费、企业和开发者三条线；ChatGPT 原负责人 Nick Turley 转任企业产品改版；前 Instagram 副总裁 Ashley Alexander 接任消费产品负责人。

item.title: Anthropic 融资 300 亿美元，估值升至 9000 亿美元，超越 OpenAI
item.guid: Anthropic-融资-300-亿美元，估值升至-9000-亿美元，超越-OpenAI
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Anthropic has reached terms for a $30 billion funding round, which would value the company at approximately $900 billion after the financing, nearly tripling its valuation of $350 billion from early February this year. 据《金融时报》报道，Anthropic 已就一轮 300 亿美元的融资达成条款，融资完成后公司估值将约达 9000 亿美元，较今年 2 月初 3500 亿美元的估值接近翻三倍。

This round of financing was co-led by Dragoneer Investment Group, Greenoaks Capital, Sequoia Capital, and Altimeter Capital. The report states that each lead investor is expected to contribute no less than $2 billion. 本轮融资由 Dragoneer Investment Group、Greenoaks Capital、红杉资本（Sequoia Capital）和 Altimeter Capital 联合领投，报道称，每家领投机构预计出资不低于 20 亿美元。

item.title: 微信捐赠第一行代码和测试用机，入藏 CCF 计算机博物馆
item.guid: 微信捐赠第一行代码和测试用机，入藏-CCF-计算机博物馆
item.description:
The CCF Computer Museum (CCM) yesterday received a batch of early historical artifacts donated by the Tencent WeChat team, including the original archive of WeChat's first line of backend code, early development equipment such as an iMac ME086CH/21-inch all-in-one and a Dell tower workstation, as well as early testing terminals like the Apple iPod Touch 3 and Nokia 5800XM. CCF 计算机博物馆（CCM）昨日收到腾讯微信团队捐赠的一批早期历史实物，包括微信第一行后台代码原始存档、早期开发设备 iMac ME086CH/21 寸一体机与戴尔塔式工作站，以及 Apple iPod Touch 3、诺基亚 5800XM 等早期测试终端。

CCM stated that due to the extremely fast iteration speed of mobile products and the ease with which digital data can be overwritten and deleted, a large number of physical artifacts witnessing the dawn of the mobile internet have not been systematically protected. This donation showcases WeChat's R&D chain from 0 to 1, serving as a core physical testament to the early development of China's mobile internet. CCM 表示，由于移动产品迭代速度极快、数字资料易被覆盖删除，大量见证移动互联网起步的实物未能得到系统保护。此次捐赠呈现了微信从 0 到 1 的研发链条，是中国移动互联网早期发展的核心实物见证。

The main building of CCM has been fully completed and is scheduled to open in September this year. It is currently continuously soliciting computer-related collections from all periods from the public. CCM 主体建筑已全面落成，拟于今年 9 月开馆，目前持续面向社会征集各时期计算机相关藏品。

item.title: 保时捷称被中国车企抄袭「有些许无奈」，罗永浩：保时捷自己就有前科
item.guid: 保时捷称被中国车企抄袭「有些许无奈」，罗永浩：保时捷自己就有前科
item.description:
Tang Fengliang, Vice President of Media and Public Relations at Porsche China, recently stated at the "Yijingsi Forum" in Zhejiang that Porsche has inspired a highly unified automotive design aesthetic in recent years, and being imitated by Chinese car companies brings "a bit of helplessness in addition to honor." 保时捷中国传媒公关副总裁唐风靓日前在浙江「易境思论坛」上表示，过去几年保时捷激发了高度统一的汽车设计审美，被中国车企模仿「除了荣幸也有些许无奈」。

Luo Yonghao subsequently responded on Weibo, saying that Porsche's "helplessness" is understandable, but claiming that Chinese car companies' imitation is "highly unified" is bragging. 罗永浩随后在微博发文回应，称保时捷说「无奈」可以理解，但称中国车企抄袭得「高度统一」则是吹牛。

He also pointed out that Porsche historically plagiarized the design of the Czechoslovak brand Tatra, and cited Volkswagen's out-of-court settlement payment of 1 million West German marks to Tatra in 1965, bluntly stating, "When it comes to the degree of rogue behavior, who can compare with Porsche?" 他同时指出，保时捷历史上也曾抄袭捷克斯洛伐克品牌太脱拉（Tatra）的设计，并以 1965 年大众汽车向太脱拉支付 100 万西德马克庭外和解赔偿金为据，直言「说到流氓程度，谁能跟保时捷比」。

These remarks immediately sparked discussion. Some netizens pointed out that he committed the logical fallacy of "appeal to hypocrisy," to which Luo Yonghao strongly retorted, stating that he had clearly admitted that plagiarists are "also rogues," and was not excusing plagiarism. 此番言论随即引发讨论。有网友指其犯了「诉诸伪善」的逻辑错误，罗永浩强硬回怼，称自己已明确承认抄袭者「也是流氓」，并非为抄袭行为开脱。

item.title: 华为 Mate X7 官方降价 1000 元
item.guid: 华为-Mate-X7-官方降价-1000-元
item.description:
Huawei announced yesterday that two of its foldable phones are simultaneously launching price reduction promotions: 华为昨日宣布，旗下两款折叠屏手机同步开启降价优惠：

The entire Mate X7 series is directly reduced by 1,000 yuan, with prices starting from 11,999 yuan after the discount; the Mate X6 is directly reduced by 3,000 yuan, with prices starting from 9,999 yuan after the discount.

item.title: 追觅造车主体约 232 万元股权遭冻结
item.guid: 追觅造车主体约-232-万元股权遭冻结
item.description:
Qichacha App shows that Starry Sky Project (Shanghai) Automotive Technology Co., Ltd., controlled by Yu Hao, founder of Dreame Technology, recently added an equity freeze information. The frozen equity amount is approximately 2.3225 million yuan, and the enterprise where the equity is located is Shanghai Starry Sky Project Import and Export Trade Co., Ltd. 企查查 App 显示，追觅科技创始人俞浩实控的星空计划（上海）汽车科技有限责任公司近日新增一则股权冻结信息，股权数额约为 232.25 万元，股权所在企业为上海星空计划进出口贸易有限责任公司。

Last August, Dreame Technology announced its entry into the automotive sector. As of now, the Dreame automotive team has about a thousand people, with R&D personnel accounting for 70%, and self-developed technologies covering multiple core areas of smart cars. The official has not yet responded to the equity freeze of the car manufacturing entity. 去年 8 月，追觅科技宣布进入汽车领域。截至目前，追觅汽车团队规模约千人，研发人员占比达 70%，自研覆盖智能汽车多个核心领域。此次造车主体出现股权冻结，官方尚未就相关情况作出回应。

item.title: 国行 Switch 正式停服
item.guid: 国行-Switch-正式停服
item.description:
The Nintendo eShop for the Chinese version of Switch officially ceased operations last night. From now on, the Chinese version of Switch will no longer be able to play online or download games. 国行 Switch 的 Nintendo e 商店已于昨晚正式停服，至此，国行 Switch 将无法再进行联网对战或下载游戏。

Before the service shutdown, the official team sent reminders to relevant players, advising them to complete the download and activation of all purchased games, DLCs, and redemption codes before the shutdown; digital content will not be recoverable after deleting game data or formatting the console. 官方在停服前向相关玩家发送提醒，建议玩家在停服前完成所有已购游戏、DLC 及兑换码的下载与激活；删除游戏数据或对主机进行格式化后，数字内容将无法恢复。

On March 31st this year, the game sales service for the Chinese version of Switch was the first to cease; and according to previous official announcements, starting from December 31st this year, the repair service for Chinese version Switch consoles and accessories will also be fully terminated. This means that official after-sales support for the Chinese version of Switch will completely end by the close of this year. 今年 3 月 31 日，国行 Switch 的游戏售卖服务已率先停止；而根据官方此前公告，今年 12 月 31 日起，国行 Switch 主机及配件的维修服务也将全面终止。这意味着，国行 Switch 的官方售后支持将在今年底彻底画上句号。

item.title: 百度成立模型委员会 BMC
item.guid: 百度成立模型委员会-BMC
item.description:
According to a report by "STAR Market Daily," Baidu recently established an internal Baidu Model Committee (Baidu Model Committee, BMC), whose members are young researchers with a deep understanding of large models. Both the Basic Model Unit (BMU) and the Application Model Unit (AMU) report to this committee. 据《科创板日报》报道，百度近日内部设立百度模型委员会（Baidu Model Committee，BMC），成员由对大模型有深刻理解的年轻研究员构成。基础模型研发部（BMU）与应用模型研发部（AMU）均向该委员会汇报。

Insiders revealed that the newly established BMC will comprehensively coordinate Baidu's large model business, covering the entire chain from path exploration, technical planning, model training to business implementation, with the goal of achieving integrated management of models from technology to application. 知情人士透露，新成立的 BMC 将全面统筹百度大模型业务，覆盖路径探索、技术规划、模型训练到业务落地的完整链条，目标是实现模型从技术到应用的一体化管理。

Baidu stated that this move will help concentrate advantageous resources and continuously build and strengthen technological advantages in the direction of artificial intelligence. 百度方面表示，此举有助于集中优势资源，持续建设并强化人工智能方向的技术优势。

item.title: 三星电子单季营收创历史纪录，半导体撑起超九成营业利润
item.guid: 三星电子单季营收创历史纪录，半导体撑起超九成营业利润
item.description:
Samsung Electronics yesterday released its first-quarter (January 1 to March 31) earnings report for fiscal year 2026: 三星电子昨日发布 2026 财年第一季度（1 月 1 日至 3 月 31 日）业绩报告：

During the period, consolidated revenue reached 133.9 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 69% and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 43%; operating profit was 57.2 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 756% and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 185%, with an operating profit margin of 42.8%. Net profit was 47.2 trillion Korean Won, with a net profit margin of 35.3%. Basic earnings per share were 7123 Korean Won.

    Semiconductor (DS): Revenue of 81.7 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 225% and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 86%; operating profit of 53.7 trillion Korean Won. Among them, memory business revenue was 74.8 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 292% and a quarter-on-quarter increase of 101%, serving as the core growth engine for this quarter;

    Device eXperience (DX, including mobile phones and consumer electronics): Revenue of 52.7 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 2%; operating profit of 3.0 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year decrease of approximately 1.8 trillion Korean Won;

    Display (SDC): Revenue of 6.7 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 14%; operating profit of 0.4 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year decrease of 0.1 trillion Korean Won;

    Harman: Revenue of 3.8 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 12%; operating profit of 0.2 trillion Korean Won.

For the next quarter's outlook, the company expects strong demand for server memory and SSDs driven by AI infrastructure expansion, and plans to deliver the first samples of HBM4E to customers to solidify its technological leadership; in terms of the mobile phone business, the launch effect of the Galaxy S26 series is expected to wane, and profitability is anticipated to be under pressure. 下季度展望，公司预计 AI 基础设施扩张驱动的服务器内存及 SSD 需求将持续强劲，计划向客户交付 HBM4E 首批样品以巩固技术领先地位；手机业务方面，Galaxy S26 系列发布效应趋于消退，盈利能力预计承压。

item.title: 海力士今年一季度营收 52.58 万亿韩元，营业利润同比暴涨 405%
item.guid: 海力士今年一季度营收-52.58-万亿韩元，营业利润同比暴涨-405%
item.description:
Yesterday, SK Hynix released its first-quarter (ending March 31) results for this year. According to K-IFRS standards, revenue for the period reached 52.58 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 198%; operating profit was 37.61 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 405%; net profit was 40.35 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 398%. 昨天，海力士于发布今年第一季度（截至 3 月 31 日）业绩，按 K-IFRS 口径，期内实现营收 52.58 万亿韩元，同比增长 198%；营业利润 37.61 万亿韩元，同比增长 405%；净利润 40.35 万亿韩元，同比增长 398%。

This quarter's revenue surpassed 50 trillion Korean Won for the first time in a single quarter, setting a new historical high. Key financial indicators are as follows: 本季度营收首次单季突破 50 万亿韩元，创历史新高。主要财务指标如下：

    Gross profit of 41.68 trillion Korean Won, gross profit margin of 79%, a year-on-year increase of 22 percentage points;

    Operating profit margin of 72%, a new historical high for a single quarter, a quarter-on-quarter increase of 14 percentage points;

    EBITDA of 41.34 trillion Korean Won, EBITDA margin of 79%, a year-on-year increase of 284%;

    Net profit margin of 77%, with non-operating profit of 14.01 trillion Korean Won, including investment asset valuation gains of 9.94 trillion Korean Won.

item.title: 铠侠：2027 年内存仍吃紧、净利润净同比增长 103.6%
item.guid: 铠侠：2027-年内存仍吃紧、净利润净同比增长-103.6%
item.description:
Kioxia Holdings yesterday released its fiscal year 2026 results for the period ending March 31st this year. During the period, revenue reached 2.3376 trillion Japanese Yen, a year-on-year increase of 37.0%; according to IFRS standards, net profit attributable to parent company was 554.49 billion Japanese Yen, a year-on-year increase of 103.6%. 铠侠控股昨日发布截至今年 3 月 31 日止 2026 财年业绩，期内实现营收 2.3376 万亿日元，同比增长 37.0%；按 IFRS 口径，归母净利润为 5544.9 亿日元，同比增长 103.6%。

    SSD and storage business revenue was 1.3626 trillion Japanese Yen, an increase of 37.5% year-on-year to 371.5 billion Japanese Yen;

    Smart device business revenue was 759.98 billion yen, a year-on-year increase of 51.6% to 258.8 billion yen;

    Other businesses (including retail products such as SD cards, USB drives, and sales to the SanDisk Group) generated revenue of 215.01 billion yen, roughly flat year-on-year.

According to Cailian Press, Kioxia stated that orders from AI server customers continue to strengthen, with NAND prices denominated in US dollars more than doubling in the first quarter, and expects NAND storage supply to remain tight in fiscal year 2027. 另据财联社报道，铠侠表示，AI 服务器客户的订单量持续走强，以美元计价的 NAND 价格在一季度上涨逾一倍，并预计 2027 年度 NAND 存储供应仍将维持紧张态势。

item.title: 微信发布「全球青少年 AI+ 小程序」洞察报告
item.guid: 微信发布「全球青少年-AI+-小程序」洞察报告
item.description:
Yesterday, Tencent Research Institute, in conjunction with WeChat, released the "Global Youth AI+ Mini Program Insight Report," disclosing key data on how primary and secondary education groups worldwide utilize AI tools and mini-programs for application development. 昨天，腾讯研究院联合微信发布《全球青少年 AI+小程序洞察报告》，披露了全球基础教育阶段群体利用 AI 工具与小程序进行应用开发的各项核心数据。

According to the report data, since the official launch of the WeChat Mini Program Education Platform in November 2023, it has attracted over 87,000 students from 7,954 schools worldwide, with more than 287,000 mini-program projects created. 据报告数据显示，自 2023 年 11 月微信小程序教育平台正式对外开放以来，已吸引全球 7954 所学校的逾 8.7 万名学生参与，累计创建小程序项目超 28.7 万个。

During the development process, teachers and students consume over 50 billion tokens annually for AI-assisted creation, supporting approximately 3.75 million human-computer interactions. Additionally, WeChat's Global Mini Program Innovation Challenge, held for four consecutive years, has generated a total of 7,430 works, with the fourth edition alone receiving 4,900 submissions, showing a significant surge. 在开发流程中，师生调用 AI 辅助创作每年消耗 Token 量超过 500 亿，支撑约 375 万次人机交互。此外，微信连续四年举办的小程序全球创新挑战赛共产生 7430 个作品，其中第四届单届提交量达 4900 个，呈显著爆发趋势。

Regarding developer profiles, 62% of projects were completed independently by individuals, with the youngest award-winning developer being only 5 years old. Regional activity data shows Hong Kong, Beijing, and Macau ranking in the top three, and cross-national development characteristics have emerged in project collaboration. 开发者画像层面，62% 的项目由单人独立完成，最小获奖开发者年仅 5 岁。地域活跃度数据显示，中国香港、北京及中国澳门位列前三，且项目协作已出现跨国别开发特征。

In terms of application directions, developers born after 2005 primarily focus on practical social scenarios such as accessibility assistance, carbon footprint tracking, elder care, and health management. 在应用方向上，05 后开发者主要聚焦于无障碍辅助、碳足迹、适老化关怀及健康管理等社会实用场景。

item.title: 💡 何小鹏：当车展上不再有 150 款新车时，中国汽车内卷可能就结束了
item.guid: 💡-何小鹏：当车展上不再有-150-款新车时，中国汽车内卷可能就结束了
item.description:
According to Ruijian Economy, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of XPeng Group, stated yesterday at the "18th Xuanyuan Automobile Blue Book Forum" that "when we no longer see 150 new cars at the Beijing and Shanghai Auto Shows, the 'involution' in China's automotive industry might come to an end." 据睿见 Economy 报道，小鹏集团董事长、CEO 何小鹏昨日在「第十八届轩辕汽车蓝皮书论坛」上表示，「什么时候我们看到北京、上海车展上不再有 150 款新车的时候，中国汽车的内卷可能就结束了。」

He Xiaopeng stated that over the past decade, China's new energy vehicles have undergone two significant transformations: first, the core driving energy shifted from traditional fossil fuels to electrochemical energy; second, the industry fully entered the initial popularization phase of intelligence. 何小鹏表示，过去十年，中国新能源汽车经历了两个重要转变：一是核心驱动能源从传统化石能源切换至电化学能源；二是行业全面进入初步普及的智能化阶段。

He said that ten years ago, almost no one believed that Chinese automobiles could achieve their current success in the global market and realize large-scale global expansion. 他称，十年前几乎没有人相信中国汽车能在全球市场取得如今的成绩，并实现规模化的全球化布局。

He Xiaopeng believes that the next decade will be a dual superposition stage of electrochemical energy and data energy, where chips and models will become new "engines," and the capabilities of automobiles and robots will be deeply integrated within this decade. 何小鹏认为，下一个十年将是电化学能源与数据能源的双重叠加阶段，芯片和模型将成为新的「引擎」，汽车与机器人的能力将在这十年内深度整合。

item.title: 5999 元，ROG XREAL R1 电竞 AI 眼镜开启预约
item.guid: 5999-元，ROG-XREAL-R1-电竞-AI-眼镜开启预约
item.description:
The ROG XREAL R1 gaming AR glasses, a collaboration between ROG and XREAL, have officially opened for pre-orders, with an initial exclusive price set at 5999 yuan. ROG 与 XREAL 联名推出的电竞 AR 眼镜 ROG XREAL R1 正式开启预约，首发专享价定为 5999 元。

    Refresh rate up to 240Hz, supports a maximum 171-inch virtual giant screen, capable of displaying a 128-inch image at an extended distance of about 4 meters, with a 57° field of view;

    106% sRGB color gamut, 700 nits perceived brightness, supports HDR 10 and electrochromic dimming;

    Native 3DoF hover mode, allows fixed screen display, officially stated to be free of dizziness.

item.title: 荣耀 CEO 李健官宣机器人手机今年 Q3 发布
item.guid: 荣耀-CEO-李健官宣机器人手机今年-Q3-发布
item.description:
Honor officially unveiled its first Robot Phone yesterday at the Cannes Film Festival and announced it as the sole imaging partner in the history of Cannes China Night. CEO Li Jian announced on site that the Honor Robot Phone is planned for official release in the third quarter of this year. 荣耀昨日在戛纳电影节正式亮相首款机器人手机（Robot Phone），并宣布成为戛纳中国之夜历史上唯一的影像合作伙伴。CEO 李健在现场宣布，荣耀 Robot Phone 计划于今年第三季度正式发布

The Honor Robot Phone is equipped with a self-developed 4DoF gimbal system, giving the device physical movement capabilities. At the software level, the product combines multi-modal intelligent agents to build an AI "brain," achieving deep integration of hardware and AI capabilities. 荣耀 Robot Phone 搭载自研 4DoF 云台系统，赋予设备物理运动能力。在软件层面，该产品结合多模态智能体构建 AI「大脑」，实现硬件与 AI 能力的深度整合。

Honor has also reached a strategic technical cooperation with professional cinema camera brand ARRI, introducing professional cinema-grade color science and imaging capabilities to mobile devices. 荣耀还与专业电影摄影机品牌 ARRI（阿莱）达成战略技术合作，将专业电影级色彩科学和影像能力引入移动端。

item.title: vivo S60 将首发 4K 原生感 Live
item.guid: vivo-S60-将首发-4K-原生感-Live
item.description:
Vivo Product Manager Han Boxiao posted on Weibo yesterday, introducing the upcoming vivo S60's improvements in Live photography. He revealed that the new phone will feature a "native-feel" 4K Live function, which will integrate the perspective and tone between the cover and Live video across the entire chain, solving the "jump" issue that previously troubled users, and supporting direct output of 4K Live images. vivo 产品经理韩伯啸昨日在微博发文，介绍了即将推出的 vivo S60 在 Live 拍摄方面的改进方向，透露新机将搭载「原生感」4K Live 功能，通过全链路打通封面与 Live 视频的视角、影调，解决此前困扰用户的「跳变」问题，并支持直出 4K Live 图。

In terms of gameplay, the S60 will debut the "Starlight Live" feature, which supports automatic identification of highlight points in the picture based on 4K shooting to enhance the atmosphere. Han Boxiao also mentioned another new Live feature that has not yet been disclosed, saying, "Let's keep it a secret for now." 玩法层面，S60 将首发「星光 Live」功能，支持在 4K 拍摄的基础上自动识别画面高光点，以增强氛围感。韩伯啸还提到另一项新 Live 功能尚未披露，称「先卖个关子」。

item.title: 全新理想 L9 发布：45.98 万元起
item.guid: 全新理想-L9-发布：45.98-万元起
item.description:
Li Auto officially released the all-new Li L9 yesterday, introducing two versions, Ultra and Livis, priced at 459,800 yuan and 509,800 yuan respectively. 理想汽车昨日正式发布全新理想 L9，推出 Ultra 和 Livis 两款版本，售价分别为 45.98 万元和 50.98 万元。

    72.7 kWh 5C supercharging battery, CLTC pure electric range of 420 kilometers, comprehensive range of 1650 kilometers;

    Third-generation self-developed range extender, Ultra version WLTC fuel consumption at low battery is 6.3 liters per 100 kilometers, Livis version is 6.4 liters per 100 kilometers, maintenance cycle is 3 years or 30,000 kilometers of extended-range driving;

    Chassis adopts steer-by-wire and rear-wheel steering (turning radius 5.3 meters); Ultra version is equipped with EHB electronic hydraulic braking, Livis version is upgraded to EMB steer-by-wire mechanical braking and 800V active suspension;

    Equipped with Mach M100 intelligent driving chip, Ultra version 1280TOPS, Livis version dual-chip 2560TOPS; both support VLA intelligent driving large model; Livis version additionally equipped with solid-state variable-focus lidar ×3 and UWB near-field sensing system;

    Front cabin 29-inch 6K screen, rear cabin 21-inch 4K mobile screen; Ultra version equipped with Snapdragon 8797 Max, Livis version equipped with Snapdragon 8797 Elite;

    Audio peak power 5440W, 9.3.6 channel configuration.

item.title: ChatGPT 新增 Codex 连接电脑功能
item.guid: ChatGPT-新增-Codex-连接电脑功能
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI updated the ChatGPT App with Codex remote access capabilities, allowing users to remotely manage Codex tasks on their computer after scanning a QR code generated by the Mac version of Codex on their phone to complete device binding. 昨天，OpenAI 为 ChatGPT App 带来 Codex 远程访问能力更新，在手机端通过扫描 Mac 版 Codex 生成的二维码完成设备绑定后，即可远程管理电脑上的 Codex 任务。

Users can view all task threads, review output content, approve commands, switch models, or initiate new tasks via their phone. Files, credentials, permissions, and local configurations remain on the device running Codex; 用户可通过手机查看所有任务线程、审阅输出内容、批准命令、切换模型或发起新任务。文件、凭据、权限及本地配置仍保留在运行 Codex 的设备；

Screenshots, terminal output, diff comparisons, test results, and approval information are synchronized to the phone in real-time via a secure relay layer. OpenAI states that this relay layer ensures trusted devices can access across terminals without being directly exposed to the public internet. 屏幕截图、终端输出、差异对比、测试结果及审批信息则通过安全中继层实时同步至手机。OpenAI 表示，该中继层可确保受信任设备跨终端访问，同时不直接暴露于公共互联网。

item.title: Kimi 推出浏览器插件 WebBridge：让 AI 帮你操作浏览器
item.guid: Kimi-推出浏览器插件-WebBridge：让-AI-帮你操作浏览器
item.description:
Kimi officially launched its browser plugin, Kimi WebBridge, yesterday, allowing AI to perform actions such as clicking, swiping, typing, filling forms, extracting information, and integrating content across sites as a user in the browser. It supports local AI agent applications like Kimi Code, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent. Installation is in two steps: Kimi 昨日正式推出浏览器插件 Kimi WebBridge，允许 AI 以用户身份在浏览器中执行点击、滑动、输入、填写表单、提取信息、跨站点整合内容等操作，支持 Kimi Code、OpenClaw、Hermes Agent 等本地 AI 智能体应用。安装分两步：

    Search for and install the "Kimi WebBridge" extension plugin in the Chrome or Edge app store;

    Send the official curl command to the local AI agent to complete the installation of the local daemon and skill.

For repetitive tasks with fixed processes, Kimi WebBridge also supports creating dedicated CLI tools, which can be directly called later without consuming large model Tokens. 对于流程固定的重复任务，Kimi WebBridge 还支持创建专用 CLI 工具，后续可直接调用而无需消耗大模型 Token。

item.title: 阿里发布 Qoder 1.0：AI IDE 升级为智能体自主开发工作台
item.guid: 阿里发布-Qoder-1.0：AI-IDE-升级为智能体自主开发工作台
item.description:
Alibaba officially released Qoder 1.0 yesterday, upgrading it to an "AI Agent Autonomous Development Workbench." Users only need to define requirements, and the entire process of execution, verification, and delivery is automatically completed by AI agents. It is available for download and use by Windows, macOS, and Linux users. 阿里昨日正式发布 Qoder 1.0，升级为「智能体自主开发工作台」，用户只需完成需求定义，执行、验证与交付全流程均由 AI 智能体自动完成。Windows、macOS 和 Linux 用户均可下载使用。

    Quest is upgraded to an independent window, integrating task management, status tracking, artifact review, and knowledge invocation, and can run in parallel with the Editor window;

    Multi-task parallelism is extended to cross-project and cross-codebase dimensions, with a unified panel for real-time tracking of all task progress, and an automatic generation of a Summary delivery checklist upon task completion;

    Memory, Repo Wiki, and knowledge cards are integrated into a team-level knowledge engine, with actual code retention rate increased by 11%, input Token consumption reduced by 40%, and conversation turns reduced by 33%;

    The Experts team mode is officially introduced into the Quest window, with five types of AI agents (planning, research, coding, review, testing) collaborating in a pipeline for delivery; new custom expert capabilities are added, supporting configuration of domain knowledge and external tool interfaces.

item.title: 百灵 Ring-2.6-1T 正式开源
item.guid: 百灵-Ring-2.6-1T-正式开源
item.description:
Yesterday, the Bailing large model officially open-sourced Ring-2.6-1T, which supports both high and xhigh inference intensities. 昨天，百灵大模型正式开源 Ring-2.6-1T，该模型支持 high 与 xhigh 两种推理强度。

Official information shows that this model scored 87.60 on PinchBench, higher than GPT-5.4 xHigh, Gemini-3.1-Pro high, and Claude-Opus-4.7 xhigh; it scored 63.82 on ClawEval, ranking among the top comparable models; Tau2-Bench Telecom reached 95.32, less than 1 point behind the highest-scoring model in that project. 官方信息显示，该模式在 PinchBench 上得分 87.60，高于 GPT-5.4 xHigh、Gemini-3.1-Pro high 与 Claude-Opus-4.7 xhigh；ClawEval 得分 63.82，在可比模型中位居前列；Tau2-Bench Telecom 达到 95.32，与该项目最高分模型差距不足 1 分。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ring-2.6-1T 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/inclusionAI/Ring-2.6-1T

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/inclusionAI/Ring-2.6-1T 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.cn/models/inclusionAI/Ring-2.6-1T

item.title: 《纸飞机》团队新作上线
item.guid: 《纸飞机》团队新作上线
item.description:
Yesterday, the production team "WAI Studio FOS" behind the viral AI short film "Paper Plane" released their latest AI graduation season short film "Pointing to a Deer as a Horse". 昨天，全网爆火的 AI 短片《纸飞机》制作团队「WAI 工作室 FOS」，发布了最新的 AI 毕业季短片《指鹿为马》。

According to reports, "Pointing to a Deer as a Horse" is themed around "Graduation Season": Although "unspoken rules" are hidden everywhere nowadays, in the future, please do not fear various "pointing to a deer as a horse" situations, and bravely protect your own "deer"! 据介绍，《指鹿为马》以「毕业季」为主题：虽然如今处处藏着预制「潜规则」，但未来的你请不要畏惧各种「指鹿为马」，勇敢守护自己的「鹿」吧！

item.title: One Fun Thing｜Steam 手柄彩蛋曝光：摔落会触发「惨叫」
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜Steam-手柄彩蛋曝光：摔落会触发「惨叫」
item.description:
Valve's new Steam Controller recently revealed a hidden Easter egg: it "screams" when dropped. Valve 的全新 Steam 手柄近日曝光一个隐藏彩蛋：摔落时它居然会「惨叫」。

The Easter egg was first discovered by Reddit user RF3D19, which then led to numerous real-world tests. According to Video Games Chronicle, the trigger conditions are somewhat limited: the player's PC must be in Steam Big Picture Mode, and the controller must be on the main menu interface; dropping the controller in this state has a chance to trigger the sound effect. 该彩蛋由 Reddit 用户 RF3D19 率先发现，随后引发大量实测。据 Video Games Chronicle 的报道，触发条件有一定限制：玩家的 PC 需处于 Steam 大屏幕模式，且手柄位于主菜单界面；在此状态下摔落手柄，有概率触发该声效。

It's worth noting that the Steam Controller itself does not have a built-in speaker; the sound effect is simulated by the controller's haptic motors. Additionally, some netizens speculate that the controller's built-in 6-axis IMU gyroscope is key to achieving drop detection. 值得注意的是，Steam 手柄本身不内置扬声器，该音效通过手柄的触觉马达模拟产生。此外，有网友推测手柄内置的 6 轴 IMU 陀螺仪是实现摔落检测的关键。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《奇幻变身大冒险》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《奇幻变身大冒险》
item.description:
The Netflix animated film "Swapped," directed by Nathan Greno, who previously directed "Tangled," is the third feature film produced by Skydance Animation, with a Douban rating of 7.6. Netflix 动画电影《奇幻变身大冒险》（Swapped）由曾执导《魔发奇缘》的内森·格雷诺执导，为 Skydance Animation 出品的第三部长片，豆瓣评分 7.6。

The story follows Olly the puff-rat and Ivy the Gavin-bird, who are natural enemies in the valley. Due to an accidental touch of a magic pod, they swap bodies and are forced to embark on an adventure from each other's perspectives, ultimately teaming up to fight the villainous fire wolf threatening the entire valley. The film centers on themes of prejudice and reconciliation, using a fantasy setting to explore the barriers and coexistence between different groups. 故事讲述山谷中天生为敌的噗鼠奥利与加文鸟艾薇，因意外触碰魔法豆荚而互换身体，被迫以对方的视角共同踏上冒险，最终联手对抗威胁整个山谷的反派炎狼。影片以偏见与和解为核心主题，借奇幻设定探讨不同族群间的隔阂与共生。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《永结无情游》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《永结无情游》
item.description:
"Eternal Unsentimental Journey" is writer Zhou Jianing's new full-length novel. The work spans from the Reform and Opening-up period, the early 2000s, to the present, continuing Zhou Jianing's portrayal of the millennial generation's youthful wandering and the restless atmosphere of the early century, as seen in "The Landscape of Waves" and "Basic Beauty." 《永结无情游》是作家周嘉宁的全新长篇小说，作品时间跨度涵盖改革开放时期、千禧年初至当下，延续了周嘉宁在《浪的景观》《基本美》中对千禧一代青春游荡与世纪初躁动氛围的书写。

The novel takes a failed educational experiment "beginning in the early 90s and ending in 2000" as its narrative starting point, weaving a decades-long tapestry of friendship between "I" and Li Mingzhi, Chen Lu, and teacher Zhang Jihai from a first-person perspective. 小说以一场「始于 90 年代初、止于 2000 年」的失败教育实验为叙事起点，在第一人称视角下，编织出「我」与李明枝、陈陆及老师张继海之间绵延数十年的友谊图景。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《8020 号指令》
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《8020-号指令》
item.description:
"Directive 8020" is the fifth installment in "The Dark Pictures Anthology" series and the opening chapter of its second season. The game is set in the near future where human civilization is nearing its end, Earth's resources are depleted, and Tau Ceti f, a planet 12 light-years from Earth, becomes humanity's last hope. 《8020 号指令》是《黑相集》系列的第五款作品，也是该系列第二季的开篇之作。游戏背景设定于人类文明走向终结的近未来，地球资源耗尽，距离地球 12 光年的天仓五 f 星（Tau Ceti f）成为人类最后的希望。

Building upon the series' traditional branching narratives and multiple ending mechanics, this installment introduces more systematized stealth elements and a "Turning Point Story Tree" feature, allowing players to revisit key nodes and rewrite character destinies, supporting both single-player and local co-op modes. 本作在系列传统的分支叙事与多结局机制基础上，引入了更为系统化的潜行要素与「转折点故事树」功能，允许玩家回溯关键节点、改写角色命运，支持单人与同屏合作模式。

"Directive 8020" received largely positive professional reviews. Sixth Axis awarded it a high score of 9/10, calling it "the best Dark Pictures game to date"; IGN gave it 8/10, praising it for "expanding the series' boundaries in terms of audiovisual scale and narrative skill, making this space journey well worth it." 《8020 号指令》获得了较为积极的专业口碑。Sixth Axis 给出 9/10 的高分，称其「是迄今最佳的《黑相集》游戏」；IGN 给出 8/10，评价其「在视听规模与叙事技巧上为系列拓宽了边界，令这趟太空之旅物超所值」。
